summary: ITERATION 2 — Full e2e verification of renamed routes (/api/intel/*, /api/txns/*) and MiMo (mimo-v2.5-pro) integration. Backend pytest 17/17 PASS (health, intel catalog/entity/address/search incl. graceful not-found, txns transfers/swaps/large normalized, tokens trending/holders/flow, content generate for whale_transfer+alpha_caller/thread, entity_profile+analyst/tweet, token_flow+degen/alert). Frontend: status badge shows 'Arkham ONLINE / AI READY' with model=mimo-v2.5-pro; default Intelligence (Binance) renders holdings/chain/counterparties; coinbase entity chip swaps entity; global search resolves both a16z entity and Vitalik address; 3 transaction tabs render (Whales default = live transfers table, Transfers, Swaps); Tokens view renders trending/holders/flow-list w/ 24h/7d toggles; AI panel with Tone + Output controls successfully generated real MiMo alert (196 chars · 1 tweet) with copy button — no errors anywhere.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan context handler when convenient.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — acceptable for this internal demo but worth flagging.
/api/status pings Arkham (get_token_trending) on every poll (FE polls every 30s) — consider a ~10s in-memory cache to avoid hammering Arkham under multiple clients.
services/ai.py hard-codes timeout=90s and anthropic-version='2023-06-01' — fine, but consider exposing timeout via config so slow MiMo runs don't 502 the content endpoint.
routers/content.py: _tweet_count regex (\(\s*\d+\s*/) only matches '(1/' style markers; MiMo may also emit '1/' without parens — minor edge case for thread mode.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten for ITERATION 2 routes: /intel, /txns, /tokens, new content schema, MiMo model assertion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration_2 routes are healthy. New schemas verified end-to-end: /api/status -> {arkham:'online', ai:true, model:'mimo-v2.5-pro'}; /api/intel/entity/{slug} -> {entity, balances, counterparties}; bogus slug returns graceful 200 {error:'not found', detail}; /api/intel/address/{addr} -> {profile, balances}; /api/intel/search?query=coin returns coinbase (local catalog match); /api/intel/search?query=<0xaddr> returns results[0].type='address'; /api/txns/{transfers,swaps,large} return normalized rows; /api/tokens/holders/<slug> caps at 20 rows w/ {entity_name,entity_type,balance,percentage,wallet_address,usd,chain}; /api/content/generate returns {content,tone,output_type,char_count,tweet_count}. MiMo emits a thinking block + text block; backend filters non-text — content is non-empty. Real MiMo output observed in alert mode: '🚨 ETH FLOW ALERT: 48.4M net inflow in 24h!...' (196 chars). Arkham retry/backoff is working — no flaky-500s surfaced this run. Default Transactions tab is Whales (live /api/txns/large, no filters). Testids unchanged from iteration_1 plus: txn-tab-whales, ai-tone-{analyst|alpha_caller|degen}, ai-output-{thread|tweet|alert}, ai-meta. AI generation typically returns in 5–15s; 60s polling loop is more than enough.
